mutations.description: Obligation cue is inverted into a prohibition cue.
mutations.mutated_text: The agency must not provide notice within 30 days after application.
mutations.original_text: The agency must provide notice within 30 days after application.

mutations.description: The modal cue is removed, which should change the canonical IR surface.
mutations.mutated_text: The agency provides notice within 30 days after application.
mutations.original_text: The agency must provide notice within 30 days after application.

mutations.description: Exception scope is removed from a conditional norm.
mutations.mutated_text: The servicer must respond to the borrower within 10 days.
mutations.original_text: Except as provided in this subsection, the servicer must respond to the borrower within 10 days.

mutations.description: The temporal deadline changes while the deontic cue remains.
mutations.mutated_text: The agency must provide notice within 60 days after application.
mutations.original_text: The agency must provide notice within 30 days after application.

mutations.description: The conditional scope changes from if to notwithstanding.
mutations.mutated_text: Notwithstanding a beneficiary requests review, the Secretary must provide a hearing.
mutations.original_text: If a beneficiary requests review, the Secretary must provide a hearing.

mutations.description: Graph endpoint-bearing actor/object text is removed from the modal relation.
mutations.original_text: The broker must preserve records for the Commission.

mutations.description: A non-registry modal phrase replaces an explicit legal obligation cue.
mutations.mutated_text: The court hypothetically could review the agency action.
mutations.original_text: The court must review the agency action.
